steps.title: Convert the two percentages
steps.content:
Blue items are $50\%$ of the collection, and labeled blue items are $24\%$ of the blue items. Convert both to decimals:
$$50\%=0.50,\quad 24\%=0.24$$

steps.title: Find the combined percentage
steps.content:
Multiply because the question asks for $24\%$ of $50\%$:
$$0.24(0.50)=0.12=12\%$$
The answer is B.
